description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:jessie Docker image as the default and define two jobs in the default test stage. Add an integration_test job that overrides the image to docker:latest, uses the docker:dind service, and runs the exact shell commands: echo gem: --no-document > $HOME/.gemrc, apk update, apk add build-base git libffi-dev ruby-dev ruby-bundler, gem install kitchen-docker kitchen-inspec berkshelf, and kitchen test. Add a test job that runs on the default debian:jessie image and executes: apt update && apt install -yq curl, curl https://packages.chef.io/files/stable/chefdk/1.3.43/debian/8/chefdk_1.3.43-1_amd64.deb -o /tmp/chefdk.deb, dpkg -i /tmp/chefdk.deb, and chef exec rspec. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
